label: Transparent Cicada Wing motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Cicada Wing transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated cicada wing detail for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single cicada forewing detail with accurate insect wing anatomy, clear amber translucent-looking membrane, fine bark-grey and smoky brown vein lattice, subtle golden highlights, crisp outer wing edge, and a small natural root/hinge detail. The membrane should look transparent and glassy through surface shading, but it must remain visually opaque enough that the chroma-key background does not show through the wing.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding, wing oriented gently diagonal from lower left to upper right, no cropping, no second wing, no insect body.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves amber vein detail, bark-grey linework, and delicate membrane texture.
Transparent workflow: place the wing on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the wing.
Constraints: no landscape, no branch, no leaf, no cicada body, no second subject, no text, no watermark, no prop, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Cicada Wing light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Cicada Wing", derived from the cicada wing motif cutout.
Reference use: Extract the palette, translucent amber membrane, bark-grey vein lattice, smoky brown vein structure, summer forest warmth, and precise cellular wing rhythm from the cicada wing. The board must visibly respect these motif colors.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 feel, high-resolution source asset.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable section labels, fewer larger token rows, clean spacing, and avoid tiny paragraphs.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Cicada Wing", motif story, palette, English typography, Japanese typography with Japanese samples, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar/top navigation, metrics, charts, empty/loading/error states.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, transparent design system mood, 8px radius maximum, thin vein-like dividers, amber glass panels, bark-grey borders, warm off-white surfaces, restrained shadows.
Color palette: Clear Amber #d89a2e, Wing Membrane #f4e7bd, Bark Grey #7b7566, Vein Umber #4b3524, Resin Gold #b86f16, Mist Ivory #fbf7ea, Summer Moss #7f8b65, Smoke Brown #2f2924, Deep Bark #171412. Use only motif-derived colors plus these near-neutrals.
Texture language: translucent wing-cell overlays, fine vein linework, subtle bark grain, crisp separators, no decorative blobs.
Text: short readable UI labels only; exact section headings may include Palette, Type, Japanese, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Table, Command, Status, Tokens.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no radii above 8px.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Cicada Wing dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Cicada Wing". It must feel like the same cicada-wing system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the cicada wing motif and the light design-system board as references. Preserve the clear amber membrane palette, bark-grey vein dividers, smoky brown structure, summer forest context, thin cellular rhythm, 8px maximum radius, and transparent design-system mood.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 feel, high-resolution source asset.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable section labels, fewer larger token rows, clean spacing, and avoid tiny paragraphs.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Cicada Wing", Dark Mode, palette, English typography, Japanese typography with Japanese samples, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar/top navigation, metrics, charts, empty/loading/error states.
Visual details: deep bark background, translucent dark umber panels, amber primary actions, ivory text, summer moss support states, resin gold focus rings, bark-grey borders, fine wing-cell overlays, vein-like separators, restrained shadows, crisp shadcn/tweakcn product UI.
Color palette: Deep Bark #171412, Night Vein #241d18, Smoke Brown #2f2924, Bark Grey #7b7566, Clear Amber #d89a2e, Resin Gold #b86f16, Wing Membrane #f4e7bd, Mist Ivory #fbf7ea, Summer Moss #7f8b65. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals.
Text: short readable UI labels only; exact section headings may include Palette, Type, Japanese, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Table, Command, Status, Tokens.
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure black, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no radii above 8px.
